issues.title: No blog or content marketing
issues.description: Zero content hub. Missing thought leadership, SEO content, lead generation via educational material.
fix_steps: Publish 10-15 foundational articles: 'Cómo elegir PSP', 'Pagos para franquicias', 'Escrow regulado BdE'
Optimize each post for long-tail keywords

issues.title: Zero social media activity
issues.description: LinkedIn exists but 0 posts. No Instagram, Twitter, YouTube. Invisible to community and prospects.
fix_steps: Content themes: fintech trends, payment regulations, case studies, behind-the-scenes
Optionally create Twitter/X for fintech community engagement

issues.title: Missing Schema.org structured data
issues.description: No JSON-LD. Impacts SEO rich snippets, knowledge graph, and AI (GEO) discoverability.
fix_steps: Add Organization schema with foundingDate: 2013, sameAs: LinkedIn URL
Add Service schemas for each payment solution
Validate with schema.org validator and Google Rich Results Test

issues.title: Analytics sin configurar (Company Brief)
issues.description: Tienen GA4 y GTM instalados, pero Company Brief indica 'Analytics: sin configurar'. Posible falta de goals, eventos, conversiones.
fix_steps: Configurar goals: form submissions, demo requests, email clicks
Implementar event tracking: botón CTA, scroll depth, video plays
